summary: If built, the project would inject stored energy into the Railbelt grid when solar and wind power sag.

title: Child care centers in Alaska struggle as pandemic-era relief funds dry up
summary: Alaska received over $95 million in federal stimulus money to stabilize its child care sector. With the loss of that money, some providers say they are forced to raise prices or risk closing all together.
